title: MikroTik R11e-2HnD 802.11b/g/n miniPCI-e card, 2x u.fl
category: MikroTik / Wireless / MiniPCI cards / MiniPCI Express
description: R11e-2HnD is a Low-profile Lower power version of our 2.4Ghz miniPCIe card - it has a small heat-sink, u.Fl connector and less output power ( 800mW ). Low profile is useful if you need to install the card in device like a laptop
specsSearch: Wireless features Sensitivity [dBm] 96 Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 29 Security 802.11X authentication, 64/128/152Bit WEP, IEEE802.11i encryption Connectors and Interfaces Bus type miniPCI-e RF connectors (2) u.Fl Power Max. power consumption [W] 5 Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 65 Width [mm] 30 Height [mm] 6 Depth [mm] 51
